curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #147 into apache/commons-bcel master. Two non-test source files were modified: ConstantPool.java (dump method now caps iteration at MAX_CP_ENTRIES) and ConstantPoolGen.java (constructor limits initial array size, adjustSize throws IllegalStateException when exceeding MAX_CP_ENTRIES and caps resized array). Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (CWE-787) is correct — the advisory explicitly describes an out-of-bounds writing issue where the constant pool can exceed the JVM spec limit of 65535 entries. Locations derived directly from the patch diff.
